archived 22 Nov 2024 22:37:57 UTC wiki code {{cite web | title = TobiWonKenobi (@won_kenobi): "So the FBI\DOJ was trying to run a fabr… | url = https://nitter.poast.org/won_kenobi/status/1860030252690600399#m | date = 2024-11-22 | archiveurl = http://archive.today/CZWOJ | archivedate = 2024-11-22 }} nitter.poast.org Mel @Villgecrazylady 22h ⚡️Matt Gaetz 🧵: What Actually Happened Alright frens, now that Matt Gaetz is out of the running you’re going to hear a lot of takes on what happened and plenty of “keep your d*ck in your pants” lines too. And while that’s always good advice, the story I’m about to share goes way beyond anything you could possibly imagine. So if you’re interested in the whole story, consolidated in one place, of what really happened with and to Gaetz, take a seat and let me tell you a story 2,157 11,083 ❞ 2,927 ♥ 39,327 George @BehizyTweets 5h This makes so much more sense now. Matt Gaetz doesn't deserve this. It now makes sense why Trump wanted him at the DOJ. I don’t know what’s worse, their malicious shenanigans or their incompetance!
